records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, ah. Can everyone hear me fine?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, ah. Can everyone hear me fine?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, ah. Can everyone hear me fine?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is sudden, but farewell for now, kiddos!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is sudden, but farewell for now, kiddos!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is sudden, but farewell for now, kiddos!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Mi Rinae is casting off every shackle and burden in this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Mi Rinae is casting off every shackle and burden in this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Mi Rinae is casting off every shackle and burden in this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's off to find happiness!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's off to find happiness!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's off to find happiness!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So till I come back, keep quiet and self-study, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So till I come back, keep quiet and self-study, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So till I come back, keep quiet and self-study, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh! That parachute teacher's at it again...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh! That parachute teacher's at it again...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh! That parachute teacher's at it again...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I came all prepared because today was supposed to be a performance test... and now she just says self-study?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I came all prepared because today was supposed to be a performance test... and now she just says self-study?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I came all prepared because today was supposed to be a performance test... and now she just says self-study?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle, funny you say that. Don't you always take Ms. Mi Rinae's classes seriously?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle, funny you say that. Don't you always take Ms. Mi Rinae's classes seriously?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle, funny you say that. Don't you always take Ms. Mi Rinae's classes seriously?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You bicker all the time, but maybe you're actually closer than you let on?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You bicker all the time, but maybe you're actually closer than you let on?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You bicker all the time, but maybe you're actually closer than you let on?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I would think so as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I would think so as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I would think so as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If teacher and pupil grow together through mutual learning, that is a fine bond indeed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If teacher and pupil grow together through mutual learning, that is a fine bond indeed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If teacher and pupil grow together through mutual learning, that is a fine bond indeed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, shut it! Fine bond my foot!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, shut it! Fine bond my foot!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, shut it! Fine bond my foot!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She was supposed to be temporary, but she just stayed and stayed...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She was supposed to be temporary, but she just stayed and stayed...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She was supposed to be temporary, but she just stayed and stayed...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: When is she ever going to quit?
records.m_Talk_DEU: When is she ever going to quit?
records.m_Talk_FRA: When is she ever going to quit?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...So you're leaving now, Rinae?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...So you're leaving now, Rinae?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...So you're leaving now, Rinae?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. Teach asked me to help, so I've gotta go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. Teach asked me to help, so I've gotta go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. Teach asked me to help, so I've gotta go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I really leaned on you. And I just started to bond with the kids, so that's a shame.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I really leaned on you. And I just started to bond with the kids, so that's a shame.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I really leaned on you. And I just started to bond with the kids, so that's a shame.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle will miss you. The others too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle will miss you. The others too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle will miss you. The others too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come back anytime. We'll be waiting here for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come back anytime. We'll be waiting here for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come back anytime. We'll be waiting here for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Girl, don't worry so much. It's not like I'm going off to die!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Girl, don't worry so much. It's not like I'm going off to die!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Girl, don't worry so much. It's not like I'm going off to die!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Rinae...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Rinae...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Rinae...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know as well as I do. Our time has passed...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know as well as I do. Our time has passed...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know as well as I do. Our time has passed...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since the Administration Failure twenty years ago...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since the Administration Failure twenty years ago...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since the Administration Failure twenty years ago...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We survived due the temporal suspension, but none of us escaped the aftereffects.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We survived due the temporal suspension, but none of us escaped the aftereffects.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We survived due the temporal suspension, but none of us escaped the aftereffects.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you, who stood at the front, must be in worse shape than any of us.

records.m_Talk_FRA: And you, who stood at the front, must be in worse shape than any of us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Remember the promise when we awoke?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Remember the promise when we awoke?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Remember the promise when we awoke?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That the future belonged to those who would live it, while we lived out what's left of ours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That the future belonged to those who would live it, while we lived out what's left of ours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That the future belonged to those who would live it, while we lived out what's left of ours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So Bora cherished the past, making games to preserve our memories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So Bora cherished the past, making games to preserve our memories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So Bora cherished the past, making games to preserve our memories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I devoted myself to tomorrow, becoming a teacher for the children who'd live it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I devoted myself to tomorrow, becoming a teacher for the children who'd live it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I devoted myself to tomorrow, becoming a teacher for the children who'd live it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think you too should live for your <color=#ffd34c>today</color>.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Combined Administration's AR tech with the Overlord core from Counters Legacy...

records.m_Talk_DEU: With this cube...

root.m_Talk_FRA: You bicker all the time, but maybe you're actually closer than you let on?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I would think so as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I would think so as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I would think so as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If teacher and pupil grow together through mutual learning, that is a fine bond indeed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If teacher and pupil grow together through mutual learning, that is a fine bond indeed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If teacher and pupil grow together through mutual learning, that is a fine bond indeed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, shut it! Fine bond my foot!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, shut it! Fine bond my foot!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, shut it! Fine bond my foot!

root.m_Talk_ENG: She was supposed to be temporary, but she just stayed and stayed...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: She was supposed to be temporary, but she just stayed and stayed...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: She was supposed to be temporary, but she just stayed and stayed...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: When is she ever going to quit?
root.m_Talk_DEU: When is she ever going to quit?
root.m_Talk_FRA: When is she ever going to quit?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...So you're leaving now, Rinae?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...So you're leaving now, Rinae?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...So you're leaving now, Rinae?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. Teach asked me to help, so I've gotta go.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. Teach asked me to help, so I've gotta go.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. Teach asked me to help, so I've gotta go.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I really leaned on you. And I just started to bond with the kids, so that's a shame.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I really leaned on you. And I just started to bond with the kids, so that's a shame.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I really leaned on you. And I just started to bond with the kids, so that's a shame.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle will miss you. The others too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle will miss you. The others too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle will miss you. The others too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come back anytime. We'll be waiting here for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come back anytime. We'll be waiting here for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come back anytime. We'll be waiting here for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Girl, don't worry so much. It's not like I'm going off to die!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Girl, don't worry so much. It's not like I'm going off to die!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Girl, don't worry so much. It's not like I'm going off to die!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But Rinae...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But Rinae...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But Rinae...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know as well as I do. Our time has passed...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know as well as I do. Our time has passed...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know as well as I do. Our time has passed...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since the Administration Failure twenty years ago...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since the Administration Failure twenty years ago...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since the Administration Failure twenty years ago...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We survived due the temporal suspension, but none of us escaped the aftereffects.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We survived due the temporal suspension, but none of us escaped the aftereffects.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We survived due the temporal suspension, but none of us escaped the aftereffects.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you, who stood at the front, must be in worse shape than any of us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you, who stood at the front, must be in worse shape than any of us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you, who stood at the front, must be in worse shape than any of us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Remember the promise when we awoke?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Remember the promise when we awoke?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Remember the promise when we awoke?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That the future belonged to those who would live it, while we lived out what's left of ours.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That the future belonged to those who would live it, while we lived out what's left of ours.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That the future belonged to those who would live it, while we lived out what's left of ours.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So Bora cherished the past, making games to preserve our memories.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So Bora cherished the past, making games to preserve our memories.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So Bora cherished the past, making games to preserve our memories.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I devoted myself to tomorrow, becoming a teacher for the children who'd live it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I devoted myself to tomorrow, becoming a teacher for the children who'd live it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I devoted myself to tomorrow, becoming a teacher for the children who'd live it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think you too should live for your <color=#ffd34c>today</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think you too should live for your <color=#ffd34c>today</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think you too should live for your <color=#ffd34c>today</color>.

More than anything, this is <color=#ffd34c>Teach</color>'s request

root.m_Talk_ENG: You haven't changed a bit, Rinae.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Where's Bora anyway?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Where's Bora anyway?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, about Bora...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'm not too late, am I?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'm not too late, am I?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'm not too late, am I?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry... I had something to give you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry... I had something to give you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well... I knew you'd go, no matter what. That's you, Rinae...

root.m_Talk_FRA: Well... I knew you'd go, no matter what. That's you, Rinae...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why... I'm doing this. My role...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why... I'm doing this. My role...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why... I'm doing this. My role...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Support, just like the <color=#ffd34c>old days</color>.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Support, just like the <color=#ffd34c>old days</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is...?

root.m_Talk_FRA: A <color=#ffd34c>Legacy Cube</color>. Pandora's prototype AR implementation device.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Combined Administration's AR tech with the Overlord core from Counters Legacy...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Combined Administration's AR tech with the Overlord core from Counters Legacy...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Combined Administration's AR tech with the Overlord core from Counters Legacy...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Garam and I worked on it together...

root.m_Talk_FRA: Garam and I worked on it together...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Garam too...? That's amazing...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Garam too...? That's amazing...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Garam too...? That's amazing...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: With this cube...
root.m_Talk_DEU: With this cube...
root.m_Talk_FRA: With this cube...

root.m_Talk_DEU: We can call out equipment from the Counters Legacy server, in real time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We can call out equipment from the Counters Legacy server, in real time.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Items from the <color=#ffd34c>game</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha! That's straight outta Counters Saga! Brings back memories.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha! That's straight outta Counters Saga! Brings back memories.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha! That's straight outta Counters Saga! Brings back memories.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Violet! Send me a weapon!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Violet! Send me a weapon!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Violet! Send me a weapon!

root.m_Talk_ENG: To think you actually pulled off that game feature. Times have changed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To think you actually pulled off that game feature. Times have changed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To think you actually pulled off that game feature. Times have changed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's just a prototype. For now.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It's just a prototype. For now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But with your material-enhancement powers, you can reinforce the durability.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But with your material-enhancement powers, you can reinforce the durability.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But with your material-enhancement powers, you can reinforce the durability.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, sounds fun. Thanks, Bora.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, sounds fun. Thanks, Bora.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Truth is, I agree with Dain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Truth is, I agree with Dain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Truth is, I agree with Dain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our era's already passed. That's fact.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our era's already passed. That's fact.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our era's already passed. That's fact.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even with the cube... it won't be easy. We're not in our prime.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even with the cube... it won't be easy. We're not in our prime.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even with the cube... it won't be easy. We're not in our prime.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So...

root.m_Talk_ENG: So don't push yourself, Rinae.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So don't push yourself, Rinae.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So don't push yourself, Rinae.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And come back alive. We'll be waiting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And come back alive. We'll be waiting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And come back alive. We'll be waiting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahhh! You girls, seriously...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahhh! You girls, seriously...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahhh! You girls, seriously...!

root.m_Talk_DEU: Why keep raising death flags? How am I supposed to survive like this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why keep raising death flags? How am I supposed to survive like this?
